programmes.show_description: Proposal planner Piper's wild scheme gets out of hand when she fakes a relationship in order to plan the perfect proposal for her client. (2022)
The Island team meets their Mystery Mountain counterparts for a friendly murder game, but the fun ends with a murder in plain sight. (2025)
After being dumped and fired on the same day, Michelle is persuaded to attend a wellness and empowering program at a new retreat. Will she learn to Just Say Yes? (2023)

While trying to keep a failing Australian penguin sanctuary open, a nonprofit worker loses her heart to a compassionate zoologist. (2023)
When a professional bridesmaid books a high-profile wedding, she must keep her identity a secret not just from the guests, but also from the handsome reporter covering the event. (2023)
At first, Savannah is hired to rebrand a New York radio host. But then she finds herself co-hosting with him. What other twists and turns might their relationship encounter? (2022)
Surprises are in store for Ilana when she travels to Santorini with her Greek boyfriend Mike for a family wedding. (2023)
When Celeste loses her teaching job, her boss puts her forward for an au-pair job with infamous New York property tycoon Richard Trapp. (2024)
On the eve of her sister's wedding, real estate agent Lisa must decide if developer Matthew Wallace holds the key to her heart. (2021)
After being called out during the launch of her landmark study on love, an acclaimed professor is forced to take her own dating test with the man who criticised it. (2022)
When Madison travels to New Zealand to plan her best friend's wedding, she finds the perfect location, but loses her heart to the idyllic vineyard's owner. (2021)
After losing her fortune, an heiress moves to a rural farm where she mistakes her handsome neighbour for the handyman who helps her compete at the county fair. (2024)(84 mins)
Inspired by her father's legacy, Anya enters Finland's Joulurauha race. Partnered with a new dog, she faces challenges, her father's rival and her own anxieties. (2024)
Mystery Island hosts a corporate retreat with a guest being Emilia's ex-fiancé. Old feelings become complicated, tensions run high and allegations arise when a guest is found dead. (2025)

In order to save her father's restaurant, an interior designer partners up with a celebrity chef to revamp the place before time runs out. (2022)
After inheriting her grandmother's winery in Napa Valley, Cassandra takes a sabbatical to renovate the property with the help of handsome local, Alec. (2023)
Single chef Lidia sees her future plans fall apart when arrogant tech innovator Danny buys her restaurant and plans to completely remodel it. Can she convince him that less is more? (2023)
The beauty editor of a women's magazine persuades a photographer to fake being her boyfriend when her ex gets engaged to somebody else. (2023)
Sparks fly between a wedding guide creator and an uninspired artist as they renovate a run-down cottage for a couple's dream wedding. (2023)
When a celebrity chef walks off his show, prep cook Anna must step into the spotlight and make the show her own, with the help of her Aussie cameraman and Portuguese location scout. (2023)
